design_philosophy: Authoritative, clear, and highly functional dashboard tailored for insurance data management. Emphasis on fast data scanning and clear state signaling.

headings.usage: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings to ensure an authoritative feel.

body.usage: Clean, legible reading for standard labels and text.

data_mono.usage: For KPIs, record numbers, and numeric tabular data.

layout_and_spacing.kpi_cards: Grid with 3 or 4 columns, tight gaps (gap-4 or gap-6). Use flat backgrounds, 1px subtle border, no heavy shadows. Subtle lift and shadow-md on hover.
layout_and_spacing.tables: Full width within containers, sticky headers, adequate padding (p-4) per cell, use zebra striping or bottom borders for clear reading.
layout_and_spacing.forms: Grid-based layouts for forms (2 columns for desktop) inside a Dialog or Card.

components.buttons: Flat design with crisp edges. Use primary color (#0F172A) for main CTAs, ghost buttons for secondary actions.
components.inputs: Shadcn default inputs with customized focus rings (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent_blue).
components.charts: Shadcn charts (Recharts). Brand distribution should use pie/donut or bar chart. Monthly performance should use stacked bar or multi-line chart.
components.dialogs: Use for Add/Edit forms and delete confirmations. Flat solid surface.
components.data_table: Shadcn Table with integrated filters for Marka, Danışman, and Durum.

icons.usage: Stroke width 1.5, matching text color in context.

login_background.description: Modern automotive showroom interior, used as a subtle background for the admin login screen overlaying with black/50 for contrast.

testing.data_testid_rules: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='add-record-button', data-testid='delete-confirm-button'.

instructions_to_main_agent: Initialize Tailwind, React, and Shadcn UI.
Configure Tailwind with the specified colors (slate-900 for primary, emerald-600 for approved, rose-600 for unapproved). Add Cabinet Grotesk, Figtree, and IBM Plex Mono fonts.
Set up routing for Login (/login) and Dashboard (/)
Dashboard should have a sidebar or top navbar with user profile/logout, brand logo/title, and Month/Year filter.
KPI Cards: Total Records, Approved TRAFİK, Approved KASKO, Approved PSA KASKO, Unapproved Count.
Charts: Unapproved offers grouped by brand (Pie/Donut), and Brand-based totals (Bar chart).
Tables: Consultant monthly performance, and detailed records list with filters (Brand, Consultant, Status).
Add/Edit should be a dialog/modal containing the form fields: MARKA, MODEL, DONANIM, ŞASİ, RENK, DANIŞMAN, MÜŞTERİ, TRAFİK status, KASKO status, PSA KASKO status, AÇIKLAMA.
Implement Excel bulk upload using a file input inside a specific upload modal/dialog.
Apply data-testid to every button, input, and critical UI element.
All text and labels MUST be in Turkish.
